basic_details.job_title: CPPRI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Central Pulp and Paper Research Institute (CPPRI)
basic_details.short_information: Central Pulp and Paper Research Institute (CPPRI) Project Associate I Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website cppri.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CPPRI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: B. Tech in Agriculture Science. Preference will be given to the candidate having 8 years experience in the area of Industrial Research Projects and other Industrial R&D activities.
